title: AI Agent Ecosystem Evolution
description: From single chatbots to autonomous agent systems — tracking the competitive landscape of AI agent platforms, developer ecosystem building, and enterprise deployment progress.

timeline.title: OpenAI Launches Operator Platform — First Commercial Agent Orchestration Service
timeline.summary: Operator lets developers define multi-step task flows for GPT to execute autonomously. Launch partners include Salesforce, ServiceNow, and Zapier.

timeline.title: Google Releases Gemini Agents SDK, Emphasizing Multimodal Agent Capabilities
timeline.summary: The Gemini Agents SDK supports building multimodal agents with vision, voice, and code execution. Google Cloud simultaneously launched an agent hosting service.

timeline.title: Enterprise Agent Deployment Survey: POC-to-Production Conversion Rate Only 23%
timeline.summary: A Gartner quarterly survey found that while 78% of enterprises have launched AI Agent POC projects, only 23% have moved to production. Top barriers are security audits, explainability, and system integration complexity.

timeline.title: Anthropic Launches Managed Agents Public Beta — Build Autonomous Agents with Three Endpoints
timeline.summary: The Managed Agents platform dramatically lowers the barrier to agent development: developers only need to implement three endpoints — tools, memory, and goals. Over 2,000 developers registered on day one. Claude 4's reasoning capabilities provide the underlying reliability for agents.

timeline.title: Anthropic Launches 10 Financial Sector AI Agents + Microsoft 365 Integration
timeline.summary: Anthropic unveiled a library of ten pre-built agents targeting finance workflows — pitchbooks, credit memos, KYC, AML investigation, underwriting, and insurance claims — powered by Claude Opus 4.7. Claude now integrates natively into Excel, PowerPoint, and Word. A Moody's data partnership and an FIS-built AML investigator are live at BMO. Goldman Sachs, Citi, Visa, and AIG are among disclosed early adopters. Claude Opus 4.7 leads the Vals AI Finance Agent benchmark at 64.4%.
